name: HR finance teams in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 expense reports/month tool
description: For HR finance teams in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 expense reports/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile expense reports with credit card statements instead of manual reconciliation processes.
target_audience: HR finance teams in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 expense reports/month
problem_solved: Discrepancies between employee expense reports and credit card statements
